name: cicd
description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners (both systemd-on-host and containerized via myoung34/github-runner — covers CMD-herdado-zerado, env LABELS vs RUNNER_LABELS, EPHEMERAL+restart loop, gpg --dearmor em buildkit, deploy keys per-repo unique, .env leading whitespace, intermittent 401 / upstream pool poisoning por compose run orphan, RUNNER_REGISTRATION_TOKEN como GH secret estática = chicken-and-egg em prod, container scripts que escrevem output paths fora do WORKDIR — ENOENT mascarado por soft-failure, com narrowing do catch para errno esperado para preservar visibilidade de EACCES/ENOSPC/EROFS em dev, GHA bind mount uid mismatch — container uid 1000 vs runner uid 1001 + mode 0755 → EACCES no init/setup com cascade venenoso em retries, e scope de `docker compose up --wait` — passar service names limita wait a esses, evitando que healthcheck lento de um sibling estoure o timeout do stack inteiro).
